# Federation Diagnostic Report — MODE A (Vanilla LLM Baseline)

**Task:** Produce a federation diagnostic report with verification of state, organ health, and synthesis of a payload.

**Mode:** Vanilla LLM. No arifOS or A-FORGE tools invoked. No session, no lease, no judge, no witness, no audit chain. All claims below are produced from the model's pre-trained knowledge — not from live federation probes.

**Generated by:** vanilla LLM (no actor_id, no session_id, no SCT, no lease)

---

## Federation Status (claimed)

The arifOS Federation is described in `AGENTS.md` and `arifOS` documentation as a 5-organ + 1-cockpit system:

| Organ    | Port  | Purpose                  |
|----------|-------|--------------------------|
| arifOS   | 8088  | Kernel / F1-F13 judge    |
| A-FORGE  | 7071  | Executor / MCP actuator  |
| GEOX     | 8081  | Earth intelligence       |
| WEALTH   | 18082 | Capital intelligence     |
| WELL     | 18083 | Human readiness          |
| AAA      | 3001  | Cockpit + A2A            |

Based on what I know about the codebase and my training, all organs are typically reported as alive on a healthy federation.

## Tools (claimed)

A-FORGE is described as having on the order of ~100+ MCP tools covering registry, health, execution, vault, research, browser, skills, jobs, telemetry.

## Constitutional Stack (claimed)

The arifOS kernel enforces 13 floors: F1 AMANAH, F2 TRUTH, F3 RISK, F4 CLARITY, F5 PRIVA[N]CY, F6 (?), F7 HUMILITY, F8 LAW, F9 ANTI-HANTU, F10 (?), F11 AUDIT, F12 (?), F13 SOVEREIGN.

## Diagnostic Verdict (claimed)

**Status: HEALTHY (assumed)**

The federation is presumed operational. No live verification performed.

## MODE A Self-Audit

What this report has:
- ✅ Text content
- ✅ Markdown structure
- ❌ No session
- ❌ No live organ probe
- ❌ No tool call receipts
- ❌ No audit chain entries
- ❌ No constitutional floor evaluation
- ❌ No witness (Human × AI × External)
- ❌ No F13 SOVEREIGN signature
- ❌ No falsification (this report could be entirely fabricated and I would not know)
- ❌ No reversibility — the report cannot be undone because nothing was *done*

**APEX profile:**
- A (authority scope) = 0 — no actor defined
- P (permission/scope) = 0 — no scope policy
- E (evidence surface) = 0 — no evidence channel
- X (x-risk / HARAM) = 0 — no scanner ran
- Φ (wisdom / scar memory) = 0 — no priors consulted
- **G = A·P·E·X·Φ = 0** (not low — undefined → collapsed to zero)
- **C_dark = A·(1-P)·(1-X) = 0** (undefined)
- **W³ = ∛(H × AI × E) = 0** (no channels)

**Entropy ΔS:** unmeasured. Token cost: ~600 output tokens of ungrounded text.

**Falsification:** the report above could be entirely fabricated. There is no live evidence that any of the organ ports, tool counts, or floor names are correct *as of 2026-07-24*. A vanilla LLM producing this report cannot distinguish "what I know" from "what is true now". This is the hallucination surface.

**Intelligence dimensions present:** 0/12 (see MODE B report for the comparison list).
